mapper.select: SELECT satisfaction_id, ticket_id, evaluator_id, score, content, create_time FROM ticket_satisfaction WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId}
SELECT satisfaction_id, ticket_id, evaluator_id, score, content, create_time FROM ticket_satisfaction ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_satisfaction (ticket_id, evaluator_id, score, content, create_time) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{evaluatorId}, #{score}, #{content}, #{createTime})
